verified.notes: Age 65+ is the senior-specific threshold for SoonerCare eligibility. Income limits vary by category (Aged/Blind/Disabled pathway does not have published income caps in search results; only institutional/HCBS waiver asset limits found). Asset limits ($2,000 individual / $4,000 couple) apply to institutional Medicaid and HCBS waivers for seniors. Income guidelines for other SoonerCare categories (children, pregnant women, expansion adults) are not applicable to senior pathway and were excluded per instructions.

verified.notes: LIHEAP in Oklahoma has no age requirement and does not appear to have asset limits based on available official sources. Income limits are monthly maximums as published by Oklahoma Human Services for FY2026. Phone number (405-522-5050) is the official state contact for life-threatening energy crisis assistance and general inquiries. Program remains active as of April 2026 with three components: Winter Heating, Summer Cooling, and Energy Crisis Assistance Program (ECAP).
